allowedFreeSources: approved competitor public pages and sitemaps
manual social/community signal imports with privacy stripping
privacyRules: Do not expose usernames, private posts, screenshots, or personal data from social/community sources.
Treat social/community imports as language, objection, and FAQ signals only.
Never use social/community posts as factual authority.
crawlRules: Do not bypass blocks, logins, paywalls, or anti-bot systems.
Throttle through workflow scheduling, not rapid loops.
Only crawl URLs in the competitor watchlist or route manifests.
honestyRules: No ranking win may be claimed without telemetry.
No citation win may be claimed without telemetry.
No backlink requirement may be stated as fact without link/authority evidence. Use PAID_BACKLINK_DATA_NEEDED when evidence is insufficient.
